mapper.select: SELECT f.foodMaterial_Id AS foodMaterialId, f.foodMaterialName AS foodMaterialName, c.foodCategory AS foodCategory, f.foodMaterialCount AS foodMaterialCount, f.foodMaterialCountAll AS foodMaterialCountAll, f.foodMaterialPrice AS foodMaterialPrice, f.foodMaterialType AS foodMaterialType, f.vender AS vender, f.incomeDate AS incomeDate, f.expirationDate AS expirationDate, f.bId AS bId FROM FOODM f JOIN FOODC c ON f.foodCategory_Id = c.foodCategory_Id WHERE f.bId = #{bId} ORDER BY f.foodMaterial_Id DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT f.foodMaterial_Id AS foodMaterialId, f.foodMaterialName AS foodMaterialName, c.foodCategory AS foodCategory, f.foodMaterialCount AS foodMaterialCount, f.foodMaterialCountAll AS foodMaterialCountAll, f.foodMaterialPrice AS foodMaterialPrice, f.foodMaterialType AS foodMaterialType, f.vender AS vender, f.incomeDate AS incomeDate, f.expirationDate AS expirationDate, f.bId AS bId FROM FOODM f JOIN FOODC c ON f.foodCategory_Id = c.foodCategory_Id WHERE f.bId = #{bId} ORDER BY f.foodMaterial_Id ASC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT f.foodMaterial_Id AS foodMaterialId, f.foodMaterialName AS foodMaterialName, c.foodCategory AS foodCategory, f.foodMaterialCount AS foodMaterialCount, f.foodMaterialCountAll AS foodMaterialCountAll, f.foodMaterialPrice AS foodMaterialPrice, f.foodMaterialType AS foodMaterialType, f.vender AS vender, f.incomeDate AS incomeDate, f.expirationDate AS expirationDate, f.bId AS bId FROM FOODM f JOIN FOODC c ON f.foodCategory_Id = c.foodCategory_Id WHERE f.bId = #{bId} ORDER BY f.expirationDate ASC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT f.foodMaterial_Id AS foodMaterialId, f.foodMaterialName AS foodMaterialName, c.foodCategory AS foodCategory, f.foodMaterialCount AS foodMaterialCount, f.foodMaterialCountAll AS foodMaterialCountAll, f.foodMaterialPrice AS foodMaterialPrice, f.foodMaterialType AS foodMaterialType, f.vender AS vender, f.incomeDate AS incomeDate, f.expirationDate AS expirationDate, f.bId AS bId FROM FOODM f JOIN FOODC c ON f.foodCategory_Id = c.foodCategory_Id WHERE f.bId = #{bId} ORDER BY f.expirationDate DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT f.foodMaterial_Id AS foodMaterialId, f.foodMaterialName AS foodMaterialName, c.foodCategory AS foodCategory, f.foodMaterialCount AS foodMaterialCount, f.foodMaterialCountAll AS foodMaterialCountAll, f.foodMaterialPrice AS foodMaterialPrice, f.foodMaterialType AS foodMaterialType, f.vender AS vender, f.incomeDate AS incomeDate, f.expirationDate AS expirationDate, f.bId AS bId FROM FOODM f JOIN FOODC c ON f.foodCategory_Id = c.foodCategory_Id WHERE f.bId = #{bId} AND f.foodMaterialName LIKE CONCAT('%', #{foodMaterialName}, '%')
